mapper.sql: post_id, writer_id, subject_id, board_type, title, content, view_count, like_count, comment_count, scrap_count, status, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at

SELECT ranked.post_id FROM ( SELECT p.post_id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY p.subject_id ORDER BY p.like_count DESC, p.comment_count DESC, p.scrap_count DESC, p.post_id DESC ) AS popular_rank FROM community_posts p WHERE p.status = 'ACTIVE' AND p.deleted_at IS NULL AND p.created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, INTERVAL 7 DAY) AND p.like_count >= 3 ) ranked WHERE ranked.popular_rank <= 3

SELECT ranked.post_id FROM ( SELECT p.post_id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY p.subject_id ORDER BY p.like_count DESC, p.comment_count DESC, p.scrap_count DESC, p.post_id DESC ) AS popular_rank FROM community_posts p WHERE p.status = 'ACTIVE' AND p.deleted_at IS NULL AND p.created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND p.created_at < DATE_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, INTERVAL 7 DAY) AND p.like_count >= 3 ) ranked WHERE ranked.popular_rank <= 3
mapper.select: SELECT FROM community_posts WHERE post_id = #{id} AND
SELECT FROM community_posts WHERE ORDER BY post_id DESC

SELECT FROM community_posts WHERE
AND subject_id = #{condition.subjectId}
AND board_type = #{condition.boardType}
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{condition.keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{condition.keyword}, '%'))
AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, INTERVAL 7 DAY)
AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, INTERVAL 30 DAY)
AND post_id IN ()
AND post_id IN ()
ORDER BY like_count DESC, comment_count DESC, scrap_count DESC, post_id DESC
ORDER BY like_count DESC, comment_count DESC, view_count DESC, post_id DESC
ORDER BY view_count DESC, like_count DESC, comment_count DESC, post_id DESC
ORDER BY created_at DESC, post_id DESC
LIMIT #{condition.normalizedSize} OFFSET #{condition.offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM community_posts WHERE
AND subject_id = #{condition.subjectId}
AND board_type = #{condition.boardType}
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{condition.keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{condition.keyword}, '%'))
AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, INTERVAL 7 DAY)
AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, INTERVAL 30 DAY)
AND post_id IN ()
AND post_id IN ()
SELECT FROM community_posts WHERE writer_id = #{writerId} AND ORDER BY post_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE community_posts SET subject_id = #{subjectId}, board_type = #{boardType}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE community_posts SET status = 'DELETED', deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND writer_id = #{writerId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE community_posts SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE post_id = #{postId}
UPDATE community_posts SET like_count = GREATEST(like_count - 1, 0) WHERE post_id = #{postId}
UPDATE community_posts SET scrap_count = scrap_count + 1 WHERE post_id = #{postId}
UPDATE community_posts SET scrap_count = GREATEST(scrap_count - 1, 0) WHERE post_id = #{postId}
UPDATE community_posts SET comment_count = comment_count + 1 WHERE post_id = #{postId}
UPDATE community_posts SET comment_count = GREATEST(comment_count - 1, 0) WHERE post_id = #{postId}
UPDATE community_posts SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE post_id = #{postId}
